record.field: Look up recent marketing campaign statistics including how many people were reached
How many people did we reach last campaign? Show me campaign stats How many emails went out this week? What's the status of our campaigns?
List marketing cards currently published on the kiosk
What marketing cards are on the kiosk? Show me active marketing cards What's being shown on the kiosk right now?
Create a new marketing campaign targeting members
Create a campaign for all active members Set up a summer camp email blast Create a new SMS campaign called Back to School
Activate a draft marketing campaign so it will send on the next scheduled run
Send the summer camp campaign now Activate the welcome campaign Launch our back to school campaign
Activate campaign '{campaign_name}' and queue it for sending?
Schedule a social media post to be published at a future date and time
Schedule a post for next Monday about belt testing Queue a Facebook post for Friday about summer camp Schedule our promotion post for Saturday morning
Create an email campaign for summer camp Start a recurring campaign called Monthly Newsletter Create an SMS blast for active members
Create a post for social media
Post about our new program on Facebook Create an Instagram post about belt testing Draft a social media post about our schedule
Create a marketing card for kiosk or portal display
Create a marketing card for summer camp Add a promo card for the kiosk about new classes Create a portal card about our belt testing schedule
Create an announcement to display on the kiosk
Create a kiosk announcement about holiday hours Post a notice about the upcoming tournament Add an announcement about schedule changes
